---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or developer-experience improvement.
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What workflow should become easier, safer, or possible?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected operator, CLI, API, MCP, or service behavior.

## Safety And Privacy

Explain whether this touches private card data, enrichment providers, Google Workspace, Odoo/Odollo, or live writes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The behavior is testable with synthetic fixtures or mocked adapters.
- [ ] Paid enrichment remains explicitly requested.
- [ ] Live sink writes remain explicitly approved and one-job scoped.
